positive: An intricate, stylized illustration of a deep sea bioluminescent creature meeting a minimalist, geometric celestial body. The creature should have sweeping, elegant tentacles and glowing, organic patterns (e.g., jellyfish or deep-sea anglerfish inspiration). The celestial body should be represented by sharp, clean lines forming constellations and nebula patterns. The overall style must be vibrant, neon-pop vaporwave meets esoteric tarot card art, rendered in crisp, vectorized lines suitable for screen printing. High contrast against a dark midnight blue/black background. Central composition, clean silhouette, highly symmetrical design, perfect for repeating apparel patterns. Studio quality, maximum detail, 8k, clean edges, art deco elements.
negative: blur, smudged, amateur, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low contrast, gradient, monochrome, messy
